name: WASM Parser Throughput
description: Measures HoloScript WASM compiler parsing throughput in MB/sec. Loads N=10 representative .holo source strings spanning 1KB–100KB and calls parse() on each, accumulating total bytes / total seconds.
note: Higher is better. Regression threshold 8% (mbPerSec comparator: higher-is-better). Falls back to TS parser if WASM not initialised — records success:false.
